items.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
items.summary: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
